user.title: User Profile
user.description: Information and statistics unique to each student profile.

generatedNote.title: Generated Note
generatedNote.description: An AI-generated summary and concept sheet created by the student.

savedDoubt.title: Saved Doubt
savedDoubt.description: An academic doubt asked to the AI Solver and saved for review.

plannerTask.title: Planner Task
plannerTask.description: A scheduled academic task or assignment created by the student.

quiz.title: Platform Quiz
quiz.description: A curriculum quiz available on the platform for students to take.

quizAttempt.title: Quiz Attempt
quizAttempt.description: The result and metrics of a student's completed quiz attempt.

dailyProgress.title: Daily Progress Log
dailyProgress.description: Logged statistics comparing study minutes and completed elements by date.

formulaFavorite.title: Formula Favorite
formulaFavorite.description: A tag indicating a student has favorited a specific library formula.

notification.title: Platform Notification
notification.description: A notification broadcasted globally by administrators.

friendRequest.title: Friend Request
friendRequest.description: A pending incoming friend request from another user.

usernameRegistry.title: Username Registry
usernameRegistry.description: Global registry to enforce unique usernames across the platform.

/usernames/{username}.description: Registry of claims for usernames, ID is the actual lowercase username.

/users/{userId}.description: The root document of a user's account and profile data.

/users/{userId}/notes/{noteId}.description: Subcollection containing the student's personal notes.

/users/{userId}/doubts/{doubtId}.description: Subcollection containing the student's resolved doubt chat items.

/users/{userId}/tasks/{taskId}.description: Subcollection containing the student's personal planner study items.

/users/{userId}/quizAttempts/{attemptId}.description: Subcollection with details of past quizzes completed by this student.

/users/{userId}/dailyProgress/{date}.description: Historical logs tracking study metrics of the student on specific days.

/users/{userId}/formulaFavorites/{formul.description: Favorites tracking for science and mathematics formula library cards.

/users/{userId}/friendRequests/{requeste.description: Subcollection tracking incoming friend requests to the user.

/users/{userId}/friends/{friendId}.description: Subcollection of accepted friends for the user.

/quizzes/{quizId}.description: Global collection containing all academic quizzes on the platform.

/notifications/{notificationId}.description: Global collection storing admin announcements and messages.
